p: This page was reorganized from downloaded storage while preserving the editor-created Office macro identifiers and attachment references.
The authenticated browser must render the exact PDF page and the Verification worksheet with calculated totals.
h2: Integration gates observed in this tenant

ul.li: Jira Activities reported that the account has no accessible Jira sites.
Jira Charts requested an administrator-managed Confluence-to-Jira connection.
Assets reported that the account does not have access to the requested content.
Activity Stream, Team Calendars, Jira Timeline, Word, and PowerPoint were not offered as insertable core elements in the current editor catalog.
